anglophone.title: Remains of US soldier who went missing in Morocco have been recovered
anglophone.excerpt: The remains of a U.S. soldier who went missing during military drills in Morocco were recovered in the Atlantic Ocean, the army said. Military teams are searching for a second missing soldier.
